ad_copy.headline: Hydrate. Refresh. Glow.
ad_copy.body_copy: Your skin deserves instant hydration. AquaGlow's refreshing mist delivers a burst of moisture for a radiant, dewy complexion—anytime, anywhere.

variations.label: Variation A - Primary
variations.headline: Hydrate. Refresh. Glow.
variations.body_copy: Your skin deserves instant hydration. AquaGlow's refreshing mist delivers a burst of moisture for a radiant, dewy complexion—anytime, anywhere.

variations.label: Variation B - Emotional
variations.headline: Your Skin's New Best Friend
variations.body_copy: AquaGlow Face Mist: Instant hydration, instant glow. Feel refreshed, look radiant, all day long.

variations.label: Variation C - Direct
variations.headline: Instant Hydration, Anywhere
variations.body_copy: AquaGlow Face Mist delivers a refreshing burst of moisture for dewy, glowing skin. Perfect for your on-the-go routine.

visual_direction.layout_description: A clean, square composition with the AquaGlow bottle centered, surrounded by a soft, glowing mist effect. The background is minimal, with a gradient from light blue to white, evoking freshness and hydration.
visual_direction.composition: The product bottle is the focal point, placed in the center. A subtle mist effect radiates outward, with droplets of water subtly visible. The brand logo and text are positioned in the lower third.
visual_direction.color_usage: Primary brand colors (blue and white) dominate the background and text. Accents of soft pink or coral highlight the mist effect.
visual_direction.typography_usage: The headline is bold and centered above the product. The body copy is placed below the product, aligned left. The CTA is bold and positioned at the bottom right.
visual_direction.imagery_style: High-quality, clean product photography with a soft, dewy aesthetic. The mist effect is subtle and ethereal.
visual_direction.mood: Fresh, professional, and inviting. Evokes a sense of hydration and radiance.

image_generation_prompt.stable_diffusion: A 1:1 square composition featuring a sleek AquaGlow face mist bottle centered. The bottle is surrounded by a soft, glowing mist effect with subtle water droplets. The background is a gradient from light blue to white, evoking freshness and hydration. The overall mood is clean, professional, and inviting. High-quality, photorealistic product photography with a dewy aesthetic.
image_generation_prompt.midjourney: A 1:1 square composition of a AquaGlow face mist bottle centered, surrounded by a soft, glowing mist effect with subtle water droplets. The background is a gradient from light blue to white, evoking freshness and hydration. Clean, professional, and inviting mood. High-quality, photorealistic product photography with a dewy aesthetic. --ar 1:1 --v 5
image_generation_prompt.negative_prompt: Blurry, low-quality, cluttered, dark, or overly saturated images. No text or logos in the image. No distracting elements.

zones.top: Headline and subheadline, centered and bold.
zones.middle: Product bottle with mist effect, centered.
zones.bottom: Body copy and CTA, aligned left and right respectively.

layout_spec.spacing_notes: Ensure ample padding around the product to avoid clutter. Keep text within safe zones to prevent cropping on Instagram.

brand_compliance_notes: This campaign aligns with AquaGlow's professional and trustworthy brand personality. The clean, minimal design and fresh color palette reinforce the brand's focus on hydration and radiance.
ab_testing_tips: Test variations with different headlines to see which resonates most with the audience. Experiment with the placement of the CTA (bottom right vs. bottom center) to optimize engagement.
